Several analysts have upgraded their ratings for Elanco, resulting in a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $27.67. The company, a major player in automated chip-testing, particularly for AI accelerators, expects continued strong momentum in 2026, with a long-term target of $6 billion in revenue and EPS of $9.50 to $11.00.
